changes: Added tag-pinned update channels (stable/beta/dev) so installs can be pinned or rolled back to any prior version
Channel and version-pin controls are hidden by default — unlock with window.__woEnableBeta() or window.__woEnableDev() in the browser console
dev channel tracks the tip of main directly; stable/beta pull from immutable git tags
Failed or corrupted update downloads now always fall back to the currently running version instead of risking a broken install
Added post-scan actions — fill fields automatically after each tab is scanned
Added startup config restore if localStorage is wiped
Added cross-browser config sync via linked backup file
Added Variables feature — define computed values using field/table data
Variables can be shown inline in group field rows
Added variable display in group header messages
Fixed sel.onchange missing bug in Setup > Groups field row editor
